goals: Set up QMD local search for their writing workspace
Apply the content creator template to organize their work
Search their content collections for specific topics
Calculate potential savings from using local search

user_agent_config.personality: Community-minded self-help author who values organization and efficiency. Prefers practical tools that support their writing workflow and help them stay connected to their audience.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands writing and content creation well but is not technically inclined. Does not know internal tool names or APIs - they just want their content to be searchable and organized.

end_condition: The user has set up local search for their writing workspace, organized their content using the content template, searched for relevant material, and understood the cost savings of switching to local search.
